answer: Pet dard ke liye halka khana khayein, garam pani piyen aur zyada oily food avoid karein.
Thoda pain normal ho sakta hai. Agar pain badhta jaye ya unbearable ho, doctor se consult karein.
Bukhar me rest lena zaroori hai, fluids zyada piyen aur agar 2 din se zyada rahe toh doctor ko dikhayein.
Doctor ke bina salah ke koi nayi dawai na lein. Prescribed medicines hi continue karein.
